name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Are you a runner? 🏃
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5d9807f23c58/are-you-a-runner?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | I’ve been a runner my entire adult life. I’ve run five marathons and countless half marathons. I’m not fast, but I’m persistent, and I have always loved knowing that, in running, you get where you’re going as long you keep putting one foot in front of the other.

**This campaign has always been like that. November 3 was always coming.**

The month of August felt, in some ways, like hitting the infamous “wall” — mile 20 of a marathon, when you feel exhausted and you’re not sure if you can keep going.

But as long as you do — as long as you keep putting one foot in front of the other, you cross the finish line.

What got us here (we will call September mile 21 of our 26.2 mile metaphor) was every one of you. Every voter who got excited to hear from me. Every elected official whose endorsement we fought for and received. Every donation from a supporter who believes we can do this.

**You’re my cheering section, and I’m so proud to have made it this far. **

Help us keep going as we head into the final weeks of this race. [Can you make a donation today to demonstrate your support? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6cbb13281b&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani

name: Team Warner
subject: The winner in tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Thanks for tuning into the first Virginia Senate debate with us tonight.
|
---

| | Derek --

Thanks for tuning into the first Virginia Senate debate with us tonight. After watching Mark Warner and his opponent lay out their policies, one thing is very clear: **We need a strong leader in the Senate for Virginians, and that person is Mark Warner.**

Tonight, Mark underscored his proven track record of delivering tangible results for every Virginian. Throughout the coronavirus pandemic, Mark has been a national leader, bringing together a bipartisan group of legislators to provide the economic relief that Americans needed, ensure public schools will remain funded, and protect our democracy from foreign and domestic threats.

**Make no mistake:** The future of the Supreme Court and the Affordable Care Act are on the ballot in this election. With questions about what kind of country we want to be hanging in the balance, Mark's GOP opponent failed to make a clear case for his candidacy, and articulated views that are out of step with Virginians.

There was a clear contrast between Mark's opponent, who promises to be a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda, and Mark's commitment to Virginia values and track record of independent leadership.

We've made a lot of progress in Virginia -- this election is about making sure we protect that progress and build a stronger Commonwealth and country. As we continue to press on with less than 45 days until the election on November 3rd, we need your help to keep Mark's seat in the Senate.

**[Can we count on a contribution from you to flip the Senate blue, and put our country back on track?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabb/53d9897e/559528ab/1c88141a/3223060284/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-postdebate?refcode=20200923_f_2_nd__812__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

We're so close to the finish line, and we need folks like you to help us keep up the momentum until Election Day.**

Thanks for your support!

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabb/53d9897e/559528ab/1c881419/3223060284/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-postdebate?refcode=20200923_f_2_nd__812__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

**"The state of Georgia is in play."** **\-- GOP Senator David Perdue**
Friend -- this is what we have been saying all along.

**David Perdue is in SERIOUS JEOPARDY of losing,_and he knows it!_**

**_Business Insider has listed Perdue as one of the 10 Senators most in danger of losing this fall, and he's been quoted talking about how competitive Georgia is._**

[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2feb/5b2c1286/3a881180/25f382f6/2692767778/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_b_insider?refcode=em_2020_09_22_b_insider_img") | | [TAKE BACK THE SENATE >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2feb/5b2c1286/3a881180/25f382f9/2692767778/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_b_insider?refcode=em_2020_09_22_b_insider")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them
body:
A strong record of backing the "blue"
A strong record of backing the "blue" No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juoouy-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-j/)
As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Actual Progress Towards Peace](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-d/)
In a blog post a few weeks back, I wrote about the US brokered deal between Israel and the UAE. Well last Friday, it was announced that Bahrain would also normalize relations with Israel. That was followed up yesterday by an historic signing ceremony at the White House. In this week's blog I discuss why these peace deals are very big. Another promise kept by President Trump! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Does More Mail-in Voting Mean More Fraud?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-u/)
Recently there has been a lot of debate about mail-in balloting for the upcoming election. President Trump has been quite vocal in his opposition to mass mail-in voting and the mainstream press has dutifully negated Trump's concerns, regularly framing his views as unfounded and originating from the fringe. In this week's blog, I explain why Trump may have every reason to be cautious about mail-in voting and the increased potential for fraud. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Peace in the Middle East?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog, I discuss one of the most significant yet underreported victories for President Trump's administration. The historic agreement between Israel and the UAE, establishing normalized relations. They gave President Obama the Noble Peace Prize for much less, for goodness' sake! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juoouy-kujkulhluu-f/)

clean_body: A strong record of backing the "blue" A strong record of backing the "blue" No images? As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. Previous Blog Posts In a blog post a few weeks back, I wrote about the US brokered deal between Israel and the UAE. Well last Friday, it was announced that Bahrain would also normalize relations with Israel. That was followed up yesterday by an historic signing ceremony at the White House. In this week's blog I discuss why these peace deals are very big. Another promise kept by President Trump! Recently there has been a lot of debate about mail-in balloting for the upcoming election. President Trump has been quite vocal in his opposition to mass mail-in voting and the mainstream press has dutifully negated Trump's concerns, regularly framing his views as unfounded and originating from the fringe. In this week's blog, I explain why Trump may have every reason to be cautious about mail-in voting and the increased potential for fraud. In this week's blog, I discuss one of the most significant yet underreported victories for President Trump's administration. The historic agreement between Israel and the UAE, establishing normalized relations. They gave President Obama the Noble Peace Prize for much less, for goodness' sake! | | | ---|---|--- Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

clean_body: We're looking for Volunteers! Starting in October we're going back door to door to help our communities! Therefore we need your help in our communit | | | Starting in October we're going back door to door to help our communities! Therefore we need your help in our communities to drop off literature and wear our Merch that is available on site! Don't feel like going outside? Well, you can share your stories, call or text our voters! Contact Benjamin@miadmason.us to volunteer today! | | We have Forty Days till Election Day! Know where to drop off your Ballot: Want to vote in-person for early Voting? October 26th to November 2nd, 7 am to 8 pm remember to stay in line! Voting only on Election Day? Voting times 7 am to 8 pm! Remember to Stay in-line: | Join Us Here We're calling upon all Marylanders to help us reach our voters today! | Divas with Disablities Join Mia and The Divas with Disabilities Project for a discussion around equality, vocational rehabilitation, employment, and health care. name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: Registered? Really? Three To-Dos for Your Voter Registration
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2389)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red White & True News... Registered? Really? Three To-Dos for Your Voter Registration
---
| | Registering to vote is different from state to state and with the COVID-19 pandemic still being used as a prop to change election processes, the 2020 election is as confusing as ever for Americans. In the latest episode of the [Red White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2400), True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht helps clear up confusion and gives three quick to-dos to ensure every eligible American is registered as an active voter by their state's deadline.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2400)
---
| | Three To-Dos for Your Voter Registration!

1. If you're over 18, a citizen, and not yet registered to vote [get registered!](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2412)
2. If you are registered, go to the Secretary of State's website in your state and [check your registration](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2412) to make sure it's accurate and active!
3. And, if you've moved recently, go to the Secretary of State website of [your former state](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2412) and check your registration .... Is it still active? If so, contact their office and take the necessary steps to have your registration removed.

Now more than ever we need to make sure we cross our T's and dot our I's when it comes to voter registration. Make sure to only use blue or black ink, provide correct information, and double check for any mistakes. This may be the most divisive election in American history so we must do everything we can to focus on what brings us all together: our most basic right as American citizens, the right to vote.

[Download your state's voting guide](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2412) for important voter information, including when to vote, how to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls.

Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=252A522A20A2400) on our YouTube page.

name: Corky Messner
subject: How we defeat Jeanne Shaheen this November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
It’s time to bring common sense back to the Granite State. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/e6467d32d92cf835c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, This election is critical to the future of New Hampshire and America — and [**I need your help more than ever before**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/9d7697b4b4195d34c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

My Democrat opponent, Jeanne Shaheen, has been in politics for 44 years. If she was going to make a difference — and if she was going to stand up to the radical left in her own party — wouldn’t she have done so already?

I’m a veteran, an outsider, and a businessman. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I support our president’s America First agenda and, like the president, I know what makes America great.

**Furthermore, I will always vote to confirm pro-Constitution judges and to protect the Supreme Court. We can’t trust Jeanne Shaheen to do the same**.

We’re closer to Election Day than ever before, and now we’re just SIX DAYS out from our FINAL End Of Quarter Fundraising Deadline. Our goal is to raise $30,000 online to keep our ads running — _and we can’t do it without YOU!_

**[Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/64c84edd65ecbc09c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/57f04376a698db94c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Chip in for VICTORY!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/f2ece6cbf8bd4b9ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) We’ve come a long way, but if we want to reach the finish line and finally retire D.C. Jeanne, we’re going to need every resource we can get. **There is so much at stake this election. We CANNOT allow the liberals and their chaos to reign**. **Please make a stand and help me win. Every dollar counts in the fight to beat the Democrats and their far-left agenda**. [DONATE $100](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/67793383f1c621cbc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $50](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/bda3cf62bfb0d5cac3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $25](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/c37a9a4ef653720ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $10](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/eb3859085ae5cc91c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $5](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/97ad1b45e08ef4e4c3d6b838967d376c/33153) We need you more than ever before, Peter. I’m counting on your swift response to help us reach our $30,000 goal.

For our future, Corky Messner [DONATE NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/1208248529f95fb0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/4184b172d6ef1d7dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2049f50ee062f020/e87178d5cd07a742c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Emilly Cupples
subject: The Meaningful Anniversaries of 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Three%20Star%20Logo%20600w.png]Join Democrats from Across the State at the TNDP Three Star and Celebrate the Best of Tennessee History!

2020 brings with it two meaningful anniversaries that spotlight the best of Tennessee history - the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment and the 60th anniversary of the Nashville sit-ins and desegregation of downtown lunch counters.

Joining us at THREE STAR to celebrate these two extraordinary moments in time will be Assistant Democratic Leader for the State House, Rep. Harold Love, Jr. , whose father was an integral part of the Nashville sit-ins, and State House Rep. Gloria Johnson.

Make your plan to join Rep. Love and Rep. Johnson along with keynote speaker Sen. Cory Booker for this very special celebration of our past, our progress, and our future.

Tennessee Democratic Party | 2020 Three Star Celebration
Friday, October 2, 2020 | 6:00 pm Central | Statewide Via Zoom
Tickets | $25 [https://tndp.org/3star/]
Sponsorships Available | $250 & Up* [https://tndp.org/3star/]
(*Sponsorships include ticket allotment, recognition as sponsor during promotion of event, and recognition during the event)
TNDP.ORG/3STAR [http://TNDP.ORG/3STAR]

See You on October 2nd!
Emily & the TNDP Team

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Georgia Blue Project Board
subject: Another denial of justice just happened in Louisville.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
Friend,

Wednesday's grand jury ruling came and went without a single officer charged in Breonna Taylor’s death — just one facing charges for shooting into neighboring apartments. This is a slap in the face to the black community and to communities of color across America. They continue to try and placate us with piecemeal offerings, hoping that THIS TIME, we will fall silent.

Not only did they not charge all three officers for the murder of Breonna Taylor, they only charged Brett Hankinson with wanton endangerment in the first degree. This is a low-level felony with only a maximum penalty of 5 years. No charges of manslaughter or homicide.

They felt that a wall deserved more justice than Breonna Taylor. Her family and the memory of her life deserve better than this.

The shockwaves of this decision and its effect on precedent in terms of how police brutality is prosecuted could be massive. That is why our work is so important. We must fight to flip the U.S. Congress and the Georgia state legislature so that we can pass meaningful police reform. We must fight to replace the morally bankrupt leaders in our criminal justice system across the South.

Georgia Blue Project’s mission is to galvanize voters and make sure when they turn out, they vote Democratic up and down the ticket. We can flip Georgia blue, and by doing so change the White House, the Senate majority in Washington and even break the Republican stranglehold on our State Legislature. We can realize the change we seek in a country that too often does not seem to love Black lives, even when Black lives try so hard to love this country.

Friend, can you chip in $26—one dollar for each race we are targeting with ads—whatever you can today, to help us stand against injustice and see our purpose through?

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Donate $26 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_26]

Donate $50 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_50]

Donate $100 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_100]

Donate $250 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_250]

Donate $500 today>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_500]

Thank you for your support and commitment to realizing a brighter future for all those at risk of discrimination and persecution at the hands of the law.

—Georgia Blue Project Board
GeorgiaBlueProject.com

DONATE>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_other]

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS ALERT: Buckle up 🚨
body:
Peter,
If you thought the stakes in 2020 couldn’t get any higher, you thought wrong. And, if you thought the vicious attacks against now-Justice Kavanaugh were extreme, buckle up. The vitriol is already starting.
**The reality is this -- you and I are faced with a titanic opportunity, and the next six weeks are going to be absolutely brutal.**
And, at My Faith Votes, our job has now become even more important. Our ability to drive Christian voters to the polls and vote their faith matters, and it matters deeply — particularly in regards to the White House and Senate races. This next Supreme Court nomination has the ability to impact our nation for at least a generation.
Even if President Trump’s nominee is confirmed before the end of the year, be forewarned! 2021 will bring an unprecedented Senate battle for creative ways to take control of the Court and ramrod a radical agenda down the middle of Main Street. It matters greatly if Christians show up to vote and if Americans elect senators who stand for Christian values, like sanctity of life, marriage and family, and religious freedom.
**[To help us supercharge our activity for the next six weeks, I urge you -- more strongly than ever -- to make a donation to My Faith Votes now.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/e200924apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200924apl01nd&n=1)**
To give you even more of an incentive, another generous donor has stepped forward to match every single grassroots donation up to $550,000. This is how we’ll be funding our targeting and mobilization efforts, as well as our biggest TV ad campaign that we’ve ever launched.
From religious liberty to abortion to every other issue that impacts our faith, it all hangs in the balance. This is our time to step up in a way that we haven’t done before.
So what I ask right now is this -- stop reading. You know what a big deal this is.
**[Please head over to the My Faith Votes website right now, and give the biggest gift you possibly can, which will be matched dollar for dollar, up to $550,000.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/e200924apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200924apl01nd&n=2)**
Your participation and support have been incredible, but now we’re jumping into the trenches.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/e200924apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200924apl01nd&n=3)

name: Ethan
subject: Quick reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hello Peter, As you probably know, we have a fun event coming up on Sunday! Since this will likely be our last fundraising event of the race, I hope you can attend! It's a fun way to spend the afternoon, learn more about your community, and support the campaign. You can still[ RSVP by clicking here](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/YEdya-jKiF5tlRNbhNzX6VD_SptW7bOwiT-Rae_V38g=) or emailing me._ __(Plus there 's going to be pizza!)_ Hope to see you there! Sincerely, Ethan _P.S. We have to prepare race packets in advance, so if you 're planning to attend, we really need you to RSVP and let us know!_
> \---------- Forwarded message --------- **From:** Betsy Rader
> **Date:** September 23, 2020
> **To:** Peter <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/NfPImuwD5VyflRG3UtIYSPhLFjH_X7ZvnL1yXgfTcy0=)>
> **Subject:** Have you signed up?
---

| | | |
---
---
**Join me on September 27th for Betsy 's Amazing Race!** [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/kTxKy-2dMHu7rwE5AGaSSTNB0xX8Ne2gWHK9y7iVnZ4=) or contact Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/NfPImuwD5VyflRG3UtIYSPhLFjH_X7ZvnL1yXgfTcy0=?subject=Betsy's%20Amazing%20Race)) Details below! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/kTxKy-2dMHu7rwE5AGaSSTNB0xX8Ne2gWHK9y7iVnZ4=) **What is it?** I grew up working at a race track, and now I'm in a competitive race for State Senate. So I decided to find a fun, socially-distant way for folks to support the campaign, while exploring the district in their very own "racecar" **The Amazing Race is a scavenger hunt around State Senate District 18.** Grab your family and hop in the car. You'll begin at the starting line with your first clue. Solve puzzles that lead to locations and more clues. Finish and find out if you had the most points to win!I **Date:** September 27th **Time:** You will be assigned a start time between 2 and 3 pm **Location:** Meet and begin at the Geauga Democratic Headquarters _(2420 Kinsman Rd, Newbury Township, Ohio)_ then use your car to follow clues to locations around State Senate District 18! We want everyone to be safe on the road. Winners will be chosen for best team name and best decorated "racecar!" Fastest time does not mean you win! Take it slow and enjoy State Senate District 18! _**Tickets:**_ _All kids are free_ [Individual: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/kTxKy-2dMHu7rwE5AGaSSTNB0xX8Ne2gWHK9y7iVnZ4=) [Multiple in a car: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/kTxKy-2dMHu7rwE5AGaSSTNB0xX8Ne2gWHK9y7iVnZ4=) _(not including children-they 're free!)_ [Sponsor: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/kTxKy-2dMHu7rwE5AGaSSTNB0xX8Ne2gWHK9y7iVnZ4=) [VIP: $500](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/kTxKy-2dMHu7rwE5AGaSSTNB0xX8Ne2gWHK9y7iVnZ4=) **_ Hope to see you there!_** _-Betsy_
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/-xd_LohDrhy4VcA2-dZnZKSYvXrjXOuL5sO68v21mpA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/g5BlbeVLKXHfLyw0wesKXfaAOxh8gnFA9zvKUOBLjBg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/6HpXnlaHBd06G4FmlMNEd_f1JCqpbR8QLLtV0aJn-tE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZQwSXfcSwNEetUjYLCascNEXVnxxeyJrde_w73bnkKQ=/xyNTOnh0oRy2WPRWuv8DkN7LtgSPtvztdpNAtM8kOXw=)

subject: Help us write to more voters
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ae1c48eee70e/help-us-write-to-more-voters?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | We are working hard to win this election and flip the Illinois 16th District from Red to Blue.

But to be successful, it is critical that our message reaches as many voters as possible. Because of COVID-19, we are not doing traditional door-to-door canvassing. Instead, we are phonebanking, dropping literature from a safe distance, and writing postcards to voters.

Our goal is to send a personalized postcards to over 15,000 voters before Election Day, and we have sent just over 11,000. We need your help. **To hit our goal, we need to raise $1,3726 by the end of the day to print postcards and buy stamps (#SaveUSPS)! **

[Can I count on you to help us reach as many voters as possible?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=efa8190c38&e=140a9b81e7)

**For every $5.50 you donate, we can send 15 postcards **\-- that’s 15 voters you would help us get our message to.

With your contribution, a lucky voter somewhere will get a postcard from Larry, one of our artistic super volunteers. Check out some of his work below! [I hope you will chip in $5.50 and help us reach the voters of IL-16.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ddcaafe06e&e=140a9b81e7) Let's go write some postcards!

Team Dani

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Roe v. Wade is in jeopardy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It doesn't have to be this way. |
---
Folks, let's talk about _Roe v. Wade_.

This historic decision affirmed that women have a right to privacy when they make deeply personal health care decisions, and that the government must not infringe upon that autonomy.

**This is about fundamental human rights.**

_And yet, Donald Trump will almost certainly nominate a Supreme Court justice committed to overturning Roe v. Wade and allowing politicians to intervene in women's health care._

The decision to terminate a pregnancy is a deeply personal one. It belongs to individual women, who know themselves and their own health -- not to politicians who would impose their personal views.

I run a business that investigates organized crime and corruption for news organizations worldwide, and **we have investigated and exposed how dangerous, unqualified, and unregulated abortion providers kill thousands of women in places where safe abortion services are not available legally.**

**_I will fight with every bone in my body to protect the privacy of women's health care in America, friend._**

This is not about partisan politics -- it's about health, human rights, and privacy from government intrusion.

**As Senator, I will only vote to confirm federal judges who pledge to uphold _Roe v. Wade_.**

**[But I am running against a limitlessly-funded extremist who is so arrogant, he believes he is entitled to make these decisions for women in Georgia. If he is elected to another six-year term in the Senate, he will vote to confirm dozens of federal judges who will seize and destroy women's right to privacy in health care and to safe, legal abortion. Please help me win this race so I can fight to defend _Roe v. Wade_ in the United States Senate.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fff/5b2c1286/3ab08011/25f38119/2825742664/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_24_j_roe?refcode=em_2020_09_24_j_roe")**

clean_body: It doesn't have to be this way. | Folks, let's talk about Roe v. Wade. This historic decision affirmed that women have a right to privacy when they make deeply personal health care decisions, and that the government must not infringe upon that autonomy. This is about fundamental human rights. And yet, Donald Trump will almost certainly nominate a Supreme Court justice committed to overturning Roe v. Wade and allowing politicians to intervene in women's health care. The decision to terminate a pregnancy is a deeply personal one. It belongs to individual women, who know themselves and their own health -- not to politicians who would impose their personal views. I run a business that investigates organized crime and corruption for news organizations worldwide, and we have investigated and exposed how dangerous, unqualified, and unregulated abortion providers kill thousands of women in places where safe abortion services are not available legally. I will fight with every bone in my body to protect the privacy of women's health care in America, friend. This is not about partisan politics -- it's about health, human rights, and privacy from government intrusion. As Senator, I will only vote to confirm federal judges who pledge to uphold Roe v. Wade. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" What we do right now will impact human rights for generations. Thank you for staying in the fight. Jon | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Fighting for reproductive health rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

The stakes for reproductive health access have never been higher.

Anti-choice advocates have been working to dismantle Roe v. Wade and strip away access to reproductive rights for years -- and now, they’re closer than ever to seeing it through.

I’m proud to have earned the endorsements of both Planned Parenthood and NARAL Pro-Choice America. After all, friend, now is the time for leaders who will step up to uphold Roe v. Wade, and commit themselves to the fight for reproductive health care.

Meanwhile, an anti-choice group is spending over $60,000 to prop up racist fired cop Troy Nehls, proving they’ll stop at nothing to pass their agenda -- even if it means putting corrupt candidates in office.

We can’t let our extremist opponents have a chance at accomplishing this harmful agenda. That’s why it’s even more important to expand our House Majority; we must put reproductive health equity and gender equality at the forefront of our mission for the people.

That’s why I’m in this fight, friend -- and why I need you in this fight with me. Chip in now to power our movement: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.24_b1_spk_all&amount=25

The larger fight for expanded access to safe and affordable health care cannot leave out the people in need of access to affordable reproductive health care.

This is an issue of equity and dignity, plain and simple -- and if I’m running to represent my community, it’s my job to ensure that I uplift everyone in my community and make sure their voices are heard.

Friend, I’m running for Congress to ensure that the fight for reproductive health care access protects and affirms the dignity of everyone who is ever faced with a difficult choice about their health. It isn’t the role of the government to politicize bodies, but rather to protect our rights -- and the right to choose must be a part of those protections.

If we lose the House, our rights will be on the line -- and our opponent is making it clear that he’s happy to accept money from groups fighting to strip rights away from our most vulnerable.

Now is not the time to sit on the sidelines. Your $5 today will help this people powered campaign cross the finish line strong in November, and together, we’re taking this fight to the halls of Congress. Will you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to join me in the fight?

Chip in $5! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.24_b1_spk_all&amount=5
Chip in more! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.24_b1_spk_all&amount=25

Thank you,
Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.
Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.24_b1_spk_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.24_b1_spk_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

subject: The Koch network won't back down

body:

| | Peter --

We've been seeing polls tighten for a while now, and it's clear we're not the only ones. The Koch network has been pouring money behind Sen. Cornyn because they don't want to wake up on November 4th with a bad hangover and a new senator. They know that it's a real possibility if we all make a huge push to elect MJ.

name: DePasquale HQ
subject: [Demand Action Now] Protect the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Scott Perry and Washington Republicans have supported a case in front of the Supreme Court that could gut the Affordable Care Act -- putting millions of Americans at risk of losing their health care.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19506812/253375853/1819641719?refcode=em_pet_2020.09.24_b1_dhq_all-nd&refcode2=e7fc6b15-90fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZjNmIxNS05MGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KLZSTGvPTxzNnM1_GTihZs4ju8rqldAFweO0IV11qA=) Team,

10 years ago this week, the ACA Patient’s Bill of Rights went into effect, solidifying critical consumer protections for hard-working Americans.

**But Scott Perry and Washington Republicans have supported a case in front of the Supreme Court that could gut the Affordable Care Act -- putting millions of Americans at risk of losing their health care.**

[**Will you sign our petition calling on Congress to take action to protect the Affordable Care Act now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19506813/253375859/681759424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZjNmIxNS05MGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KLZSTGvPTxzNnM1_GTihZs4ju8rqldAFweO0IV11qA=&emci=7d2704b4-05fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=e7fc6b15-90fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10203249) | [Protect the ACA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19506814/253375863/681759424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZjNmIxNS05MGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KLZSTGvPTxzNnM1_GTihZs4ju8rqldAFweO0IV11qA=&emci=7d2704b4-05fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=e7fc6b15-90fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10203249)
---

**The outcome of this Supreme Court case will decide the future of health care for more than 20 million Americans.** Here in PA-10, 42,000 people are at risk of having their health care ripped away from them _in the middle of a global health crisis._

We deserve leaders who won’t play political games with the health and safety of their constituents. In Congress, Eugene will fight to ensure affordable access to health care for all Americans and take on big drug companies by working to lower prescription drug costs.

[**Will you join us in calling on Congress to take action and protect the Affordable Care Act now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19506815/253375868/681759424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZjNmIxNS05MGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KLZSTGvPTxzNnM1_GTihZs4ju8rqldAFweO0IV11qA=&emci=7d2704b4-05fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=e7fc6b15-90fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10203249) [Add my name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19506816/253375869/681759424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZjNmIxNS05MGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1KLZSTGvPTxzNnM1_GTihZs4ju8rqldAFweO0IV11qA=&emci=7d2704b4-05fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=e7fc6b15-90fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10203249)

We're sure you feel it too, friends. There's Democratic energy in Texas. **First** , we flipped several traditionally GOP seats during the 2018 midterm elections. In that same year, Beto O’Rourke came within 3 points of beating Ted Cruz. **Today** , there are more than 800,000 new voters registered in the Lone Star State. Now, the 17th District is one of _**ten battleground congressional districts that could be flipped from red to blue**_. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: this endorsement is special to Governor Holcomb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Eric has been a tireless advocate for life as governor - that’s why Indiana Right to Life just endorsed our campaign! | |
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eaa99036e909440bbce10bbc8535209d&_e=jG37KLDjHlpdLuzr2glo7CWJaZMpyR93hLbcAynOAMTRJcQ-31z12y3toXGeL_Qky6nNkdktz9cL91oWBukwyVDW4fqSkV4FLGdk4OcULRa2hGntFNG6EoGB8Sq6U1yibCMDDmaDfGoZD8Z5I2rTyBr_rePirUZyMiM9FTzjpQGgU7IzriSU-__-mGT8OgZJvijimGNf7zw51GhuuX1SHkHuMSfXs9X89VsgYvo2IB473gzVoWEIul9XnBmq89EeyhWLQM3AxILTD_UvOxkBpYxibk7tvqfijZqgLrS-z7SFaoIiE5v0SZuzjlgT6YM6uXjK3aKdmJGr79U8ES0ZtSy7nERFCaq1eluaw3C-UXhJe8LgqyO-zQR2R5Lu8awwPthz4uZkVqqJQ9lp9kadjY1y9jpncYx72IOVUo33VKZZBI_CnZXTlXZJ9vgtXU0j1FTpmIGryJQ5XFf3HWOF4kMxOWS4fgP09hIulKBiYOY%3D)
[**Defend life and endorse Eric**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eaa99036e909440bbce10bbc8535209d&_e=jG37KLDjHlpdLuzr2glo7CWJaZMpyR93hLbcAynOAMTRJcQ-31z12y3toXGeL_Qky6nNkdktz9cL91oWBukwyVDW4fqSkV4FLGdk4OcULRa2hGntFNG6EoGB8Sq6U1yibCMDDmaDfGoZD8Z5I2rTyBr_rePirUZyMiM9FTzjpQGgU7IzriSU-__-mGT8OgZJvijimGNf7zw51GhuuX1SHkHuMSfXs9X89VsgYvo2IB473gzVoWEIul9XnBmq89EeyhWLQM3AxILTD_UvOxkBpXwW0fMySKcmjGYT4y0NmEK5qERgiE0yaH1hpWr4eLSid0z2jtVoahYTHiII3S3Xwsiyl-7VTyVxGiEMZ6agq66gk7hrp9miYRVPlprbQl2HhYQZujAAbCOKMEI4HEPSju04xn6AZ8TNNmdY4d9OycT9YdEJnk0_TGJu-3aDpGFd3FGP2dHSyGmMZ67rhEm7I3PlRruk0Hc9vWnPXYi4Lo0%3D)
Friend,

**We have huge news to share — the Indiana Right to Life PAC just endorsed Eric’s reelection campaign for Governor!**
_**“The sanctity of life is a fundamental right – and in practice we’ve seen it as a fundamental priority of Governor Holcomb’s as he leads our state...Every day he works to protect Hoosier lives, including the unborn and the most vulnerable among us. He’s the only pro-life candidate in this race, and the right person to lead Indiana for another four years. We're proud to give him our endorsement.”**_
**-Mike Fichter, President and CEO of Indiana RTL**
[**Defend life and endorse Eric**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eaa99036e909440bbce10bbc8535209d&_e=jG37KLDjHlpdLuzr2glo7CWJaZMpyR93hLbcAynOAMTRJcQ-31z12y3toXGeL_Qky6nNkdktz9cL91oWBukwyVDW4fqSkV4FLGdk4OcULRa2hGntFNG6EoGB8Sq6U1yibCMDDmaDfGoZD8Z5I2rTyBr_rePirUZyMiM9FTzjpQGgU7IzriSU-__-mGT8OgZJvijimGNf7zw51GhuuX1SHkHuMSfXs9X89VsgYvo2IB473gzVoWEIul9XnBmq89EeyhWLQM3AxILTD_UvOxkBpf8R3QTtXT_KeUy8NkgccMvA9RTMWCP09ppoMHTSPM_Ye1l22-8eC2DGqZ7AB2sctCMlrZBtmQKsnFRuo_vEGb0d6gUCkdW4XIOTZNXtc4pelrN37C6AwRW21hOYxw_axvvnr5g9q6W3zgYfeY3_rM0I5_Zk4aeniKzgaQKOl-I3KNEuSPe91bdRgBuiIG2VyfeKmdmWBd8Bq4WFyxhOGeM%3D)
_Being pro-life is deeply personal to Eric, and he’s made defending the sanctity of life a top priority while Governor. _

**There is nothing more important to him than protecting Hoosier lives. And in this race, he is the ONLY pro-life candidate.**

_Under Eric’s leadership, Indiana has taken clear and decisive action to protect the most vulnerable members of our society and improve the lives of children both born and unborn, including:_
* **Reducing Indiana’s infant mortality rate. In 2019, Hoosiers saw the largest drop in infant mortality rate in six years!**
* **Increasing adoption opportunities - Indiana leads the nation in children adopted from foster care. **
* **Championing opportunities for Hoosiers with disabilities. **
* **Signing every pro-life bill that’s crossed his desk.**

**Here’s what Eric had to say about the endorsement. **
_**“In Indiana, we don’t shy away from our biggest challenges – we set major goals and tackle them head-on...Today in Indiana we’re celebrating more first birthdays, more permanent, loving families and more Hoosiers with different abilities finding independence. We still have more work to do – but together, we’re making a difference.”**_
**-Governor Eric Holcomb**
Eric will always be a tireless advocate for Hoosier lives. If you believe that all lives are precious and should be protected, join Indiana Right to Life and endorse Eric today.
[**Defend life and endorse Eric**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eaa99036e909440bbce10bbc8535209d&_e=jG37KLDjHlpdLuzr2glo7CWJaZMpyR93hLbcAynOAMTRJcQ-31z12y3toXGeL_Qky6nNkdktz9cL91oWBukwyVDW4fqSkV4FLGdk4OcULRa2hGntFNG6EoGB8Sq6U1yibCMDDmaDfGoZD8Z5I2rTyBr_rePirUZyMiM9FTzjpQGgU7IzriSU-__-mGT8OgZJvijimGNf7zw51GhuuX1SHkHuMSfXs9X89VsgYvo2IB473gzVoWEIul9XnBmq89EeyhWLQM3AxILTD_UvOxkBpbewrxvc6_xD8zckZ21usnmqVOBWUtgkvl1griN8dapj4Osc6UIneOfeqUxfmGi9CoMCCltwdkHfahN9an16cjMc64zhq17VuCCV5hC2kaEtEwNW-wL8TY9L4_pf8Zr5cH4C43vKRdRP6bHXLWeGi-bkhKbfGdlqdYLT2u-WEI4wK19_qK_1PwplWhgfbIioLlHDBedAhsecpje3UWhzAgU%3D)
Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

There is nothing more important to him than protecting Hoosier lives. And in this race, he is the ONLY pro-life candidate. Under Eric’s leadership, Indiana has taken clear and decisive action to protect the most vulnerable members of our society and improve the lives of children both born and unborn, including: Reducing Indiana’s infant mortality rate. In 2019, Hoosiers saw the largest drop in infant mortality rate in six years! Increasing adoption opportunities - Indiana leads the nation in children adopted from foster care. Championing opportunities for Hoosiers with disabilities. Signing every pro-life bill that’s crossed his desk. Here’s what Eric had to say about the endorsement. “In Indiana, we don’t shy away from our biggest challenges – we set major goals and tackle them head-on...Today in Indiana we’re celebrating more first birthdays, more permanent, loving families and more Hoosiers with different abilities finding independence. We still have more work to do – but together, we’re making a difference.” -Governor Eric Holcomb Eric will always be a tireless advocate for Hoosier lives. If you believe that all lives are precious and should be protected, join Indiana Right to Life and endorse Eric today. Thank you, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Rita Hart
subject: What’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/2Oi34toZvQVKw7DBu0uwsvDCf-8VnzWxKBZ6Y7X2XeA=?refcode=200924-am-email) Peter, We're entering the final few days of the election cycle, and I need your help to make sure my team and I have the resources we need to WIN in November. **_The Des Moines Register_ just came out with a poll putting this race as the closest in Iowa,** which means we have to match the spending pace of my opponent and her D.C. backers.**[Can you help us keep up the pace by raising as much as we can before our quarterly deadline on September 30th?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/Yg2GRc3WlSSKlP5ILEe2Jd8-wePsXSz4zwFPDV_jxSs=?refcode=200924-am-email) ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/2Oi34toZvQVKw7DBu0uwsvDCf-8VnzWxKBZ6Y7X2XeA=?refcode=200924-am-email) | ****[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/2Oi34toZvQVKw7DBu0uwsvDCf-8VnzWxKBZ6Y7X2XeA=?refcode=200924-am-email)****
---
What we raise by the end of September will directly alter the number of voters we'll be able to reach out to before Election Day.
Nearly 16% of all voters in IA-02 are undecided, and we can't let them cast their ballot without hearing my story or about the issues that are at stake.
**[From access to affordable health care to our seniors' Social Security, there's so much on the line this November. Can you help me fight for what we hold dear by donating whatever you can before my September 30th deadline? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/2Oi34toZvQVKw7DBu0uwsvDCf-8VnzWxKBZ6Y7X2XeA=?refcode=200924-am-email)**
Yours,

Rita Hart
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/2Oi34toZvQVKw7DBu0uwsvDCf-8VnzWxKBZ6Y7X2XeA=?refcode=200924-am-email)

******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpO8YeigG7x_po5CRsOqtWuFDozjggFH4FmPaxa9lkU=/2Oi34toZvQVKw7DBu0uwsvDCf-8VnzWxKBZ6Y7X2XeA=?refcode=200924-am-email)******
---

Wheatland IA 52777 United States

clean_body: We are in the home stretch with Election Day just 40 days away | | | | | Honk & Waves This past Saturday I enjoyed a beautiful day outside in Cross Lanes with a Honk & Wave. I hope you and your families get to enjoy the great weather as fall rolls into West Virginia. | | | I am proud to be endorsed by the WVSSPA. We are so thankful to each of you that work tirelessly to keep our children safe & healthy. | | | | | We need you! With Election Day just 40 days away, my opponent is hitting the airwaves hard. Help me combat his untruths about YOUR treasurer's office by donating to the campaign today. | "CONTRIUBTE" | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Perdue2020, All rights reserved.

Our campaign is _**OVERWHELMINGLY**_ funded by New Mexicans like you, and we need our supporters to contribute so we can finish this race strong. Ben Ray Lujan has millions of DC, California and New York dollars behind him and he is willing to lie about our campaign to win.

Thank you for tremendous support during the final stretch of this campaign. We are working hard day and night and I thank you for all your encouragement, contributions, volunteer time and of course, your prayers.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, **THE CLOCK IS TICKING! WE ARE LESS THAN ONE WEEK FROM OUR END OF QUARTER DEADLINE! Our campaign is OVERWHELMINGLY** funded by New Mexicans like you, and we need our supporters to contribute so we can finish this race strong. Ben Ray Lujan has millions of DC, California and New York dollars behind him and he is willing to lie about our campaign to win. Thank you for tremendous support during the final stretch of this campaign. We are working hard day and night and I thank you for all your encouragement, contributions, volunteer time and of course, your prayers. Mark P.S. If you are donating for the first time or you have donated multiple times before, I hope that you please consider setting up a recurring donation. name: SERIOUS [via Jon Ossoff HQ]
subject: Trump's Supreme Court short list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It's pretty scary |
---
Friend,

We already know a few of the names on Donald Trump's Supreme Court shortlist, and it's pretty scary.

One frontrunner, U.S. Court of Appeals Circuit Judge Amy Coney Barrett, once said the purpose of a legal career is a means to "building the Kingdom of God."

_And it goes without saying that any nominee would vote against the Affordable Care Act, Roe v. Wade, and our civil rights._

**Friend, we CANNOT allow Trump's pick on the Supreme Court.** We are doing all we can to stop Mitch McConnell and David Perdue from jamming through a confirmation.

**But if we DON'T defeat Donald Trump and David Perdue and retake the Senate, a far-right judge with Trump's seal of approval will get a LIFETIME SEAT on the United States Supreme Court.**

**To stop this from happening, we must win a Senate majority in November._And that starts with Jon Ossoff winning his deadlocked race in Georgia._**

**[Jon has all the momentum, and is on track to win. Today, will you chip in any amount to make sure we elect Jon and retake the Senate, so they can confirm a reasonable and respected Supreme Court nominee and save our democracy from the GOP?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fe5/5b2c1286/3abb7862/25f38c5f/3207491652/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_24_trump_list?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_list")**

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

name: Jay Inslee
subject: State leaders and the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
No matter what happens in D.C., we can defend democracy here.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8165%2E868730%2ERtStVO) Friend, Soon enough, we may not be able to trust the Supreme Court to protect our rights -- from affordable health care to affirmative action, from reproductive rights to gun violence prevention. We likely won't be able to depend on the Supreme Court, the White House, or a GOP-controlled Senate to fight for us. But as Washington's governor, I will fight. That was my solemn commitment before, and I've renewed it tenfold since last Friday evening. As long as I am governor, Washington will protect reproductive rights, take action to end the climate crisis, and lead in the movement to stop gun violence. As governor, I will protect Washingtonians from laws simply meant to trigger Supreme Court hearings and further extreme right-wing values. I will enshrine progressive rights into law here in case of any federal rollback. **Your investment in our campaign today before our end-of-month deadline is an investment in the fight to protect our basic human rights and our democracy. The Republican Governors Association -- like all Republican organizations -- is desperately clamoring to flip as many gubernatorial seats as possible. Their goal is to continue to advance GOP extremist values and control over our democracy. We can't let it happen.** **[We set an aggressive end-of-month goal of $75,000 by midnight on Wednesday: Will you invest in the fight to protect our civil liberties before they even get to the federal level by donating $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11668?t=4&akid=8165%2E868730%2ERtStVO)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11669?t=5&akid=8165%2E868730%2ERtStVO)

Jay

subject: Our final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in 6 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
I would be so thankful if you would make a contribution today.
#

This is a movement of and for working people.
Running a campaign like this means we’re relying on supporters like you, giving whatever you can afford, to make sure we can keep the trains running.
**Our final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in six days. **Afterwards, we’ll have to report our fundraising numbers and show everyone the strength of our grassroots movement.
**My team has set a goal for us to raise an additional $30,000 to round out the month ahead of this critical end-of-quarter deadline.[I would be so thankful if you could make a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19513309/253403404/-1084116692?refcode2=7e2751b8-a8fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200924-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTI3NTFiOC1hOGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvS-yPaAIH2hklPms-Y0aWOP-_MDBdTQqLClzzWbNY8=)**
In the final stretch before Election Day, my staff, volunteers, and I are organizing to turn out voters in our district and for candidates I’ve endorsed around the country. Our goal is to elect the most progressive Congress we’ve ever had.
Your financial support allows us to focus on the work that matters instead of worrying about fundraising, and if every person reading this email made a contribution, we would hit this goal in no time.
**[Your donation to our campaign today will make a huge difference. Please chip in whatever you can to support my campaign and our fight to expand opportunity for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19513311/253403409/-1084116692?refcode2=7e2751b8-a8fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200924-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTI3NTFiOC1hOGZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yvS-yPaAIH2hklPms-Y0aWOP-_MDBdTQqLClzzWbNY8=)**
Thank you for your support,
Mondaire

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Dangerous Chinese Counterfeit Goods Are Pouring Into America, Here's How We Stop It
body:
On a daily basis, nearly 90,000 Americans are being assaulted in one form or another through small parcel mail by unscrupulous Made-in-China exporters | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b6d2c5632&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Dangerous Chinese Counterfeit Goods Are Pouring Into America, Here's How We Stop It**

“Over the course of 14 monthly ‘blitz operations,’ a decidedly unlucky 13% of the Made-in-China packages inspected have contained a type of counterfeit product or other contraband that can defraud, harm, or even kill Americans,” write Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Mark Morgan and Assistant to the President Peter Navarro in Fox Business.

“On a daily basis, nearly 90,000 Americans are being assaulted in one form or another through small parcel mail by unscrupulous Made-in-China exporters.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2138fc0f3f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The Department of Justice introduced draft legislation to Congress yesterday aimed at curtailing Big Tech’s liability shields. “Currently, online platforms have been able to weaponize government protections initially implemented to encourage stripping down obscene content to selectively censor unwelcome narratives, i.e., conservative viewpoints,” Tristan Justice reports in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=113f22ca61&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In an effort to prevent potential COVID-19 outbreaks in high-risk communities, the Trump administration said it has started shipping rapid coronavirus tests to more than three dozen historically Black colleges and universities . . . Each school is expected to receive between 3,000 and 10,000 tests initially, and they will be resupplied ‘as often as they need,’” Francesca Chambers and Grace Asiegbu report for [McClatchyDC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4bd6ccbd41&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Since the city of Portland disbanded its gun violence reduction team July 1, shootings have increased and homicide hit a 30-year high. According to [Portland Police Association President Daryl] Turner, Portland Mayor and police commissioner Ted Wheeler has realized defunding the police force ‘was a mistake,’” Angelica Stabile reports. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=220da97863&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3869e749b8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=beb66be8bb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0bcb64d70a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

3 Weeks Until Leading America

My second book, "Leading America" is less than a month away. I'm looking forward to the release and you all reading it (or listening to it if you're an audiobook person).

I take a deep dive into my journey on "Dancing with the Stars" and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward, and why the election this November is the most important of our lifetimes.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but I would really appreciate your support if you could pre-order it now!

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3e679cbd12-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_07_30_06_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3e679cbd12-&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=d684192124-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_24_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-d684192124-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: Bill Olson
subject: The crazies are coming out of the woodwork
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am a Trump supporter and a patriot! I will not let the Left destroy this country over their own inability to live peaceably alongside conservatives!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

The passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has thrown the Left into hysterics. These people, who have been burning down cities and assaulting or murdering anyone who disagreed with them, now are threatening the integrity of our Republic if Biden doesn't win and they don't get to choose RBG's replacement.

These people are too much! If this doesn't get every Republican out and voting, I don't know what will:

A leading Democrat in the U.S. Senate came out in support of "packing" the U.S. Supreme Court and eliminating the Senate filibuster if Majority Leader Mitch McConnell works to confirm a potential nominee to fill the seat left by Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

Ginsburg died Friday at 87 after a difficult battle with metastatic pancreatic cancer.

Nine justices have served on the nation's highest court since 1869. Before that, the number of justices changed six times, with the maximum number being 10 during the Civil War.

The filibuster is a threshold of 60 votes that's necessary before a piece of legislation is given an up or down vote.

The extremist Democrats are not going to go quietly into the night. We loyal patriots who are NOT socialists must stand up to them, and quickly! They will legislate our rights away as soon as they get power.

Just look at the words of Marxist Socialist AOC, and see if this doesn't send chills down your spine:

As Republicans show support for moving forward with a Supreme Court nominee quickly, @AOC tells me if that happens, “we should leave all options on the table, including the number of Justices that are on the Supreme Court.” Adds expanding is “absolutely” an option worth weighing.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

Is this what you want? You want AOC and Chuck Schumer messing with our institutions so they can get the Socialist paradise they want?

America can only withstand the extremism of the far-Left if our institutions remain standing.

But the extremist Democrats want to destroy our institutions if they don't get their way- and THAT, we cannot allow to happen.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

I won't let it happen. I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

Americans rightly mourn for the departed Supreme Court Justice. We are a kind and decent people, and that is what we do.

What we do NOT do, is change our institutions because one political party goes nuts with intolerance. And that is what the far-Left wants to do.

If we want to defend our Constitution against the encroachment by the extreme Left, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRyZWnhD3F6OuRU&b=nItSpbugsHlUf16mCV5.Sg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Pelosi is so triggered
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a pro-Trump Republican who is proud to run with our President in 2020.**

I was furious that Pelosi wasted the people's time and money on a purely partisan impeachment sham. Her scandalous waste of time and effort left us less prepared for COVID, and impugned a great President who was finally vindicated!
**_Can you believe that Nancy Pelosi, drunk with power and driven mad by the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, is already threatening ANOTHER pointless partisan impeachment sham, to prevent the President from exercising his sworn Constitutional duties!_**
_House Speaker Nancy Pelosi on Sunday would not rule out impeachment as an option to stop President Trump’s U.S. Supreme Court pick from being confirmed to the bench, saying Democrats will “use every arrow in our quiver” to block the eventual nominee._

_Just hours after it was announced that Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg had passed away on Friday, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., vowed that a Trump nominee to the Supreme Court to fill her vacancy “will receive a vote on the floor of the United States Senate.”

During an interview on ABC News’ “This Week,” Pelosi, D-Calif., was asked whether she and House Democrats would move to impeach the president, or Attorney General Bill Barr in an effort to prevent the Senate from acting._

_“We have our options. We have arrows in our quiver that I’m not about to discuss right now, but the fact is we have a big challenge in our country,”_
_Pelosi said. “This president has threatened to not even accept the results of the election.”_

_She added: “Our main goal would be to protect the integrity of the election as we protect the people from the coronavirus.”_

_Pelosi was pressed again on whether she would employ impeachment tactics, to which she said the Constitution requires that Congress “use every arrow in our quiver.”_

She is mad! What gives this tinpot dictator the right to disregard the Constitution and threaten actions that could result in a civil war?
It's bad enough that she threatens to flaunt the Constitution and enlarge the Supreme Court to pack it with stark-raving liberals.... _but she also wants to impeach Trump for executing his Constitutionally-prescribed duties???_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g)
---

**_Nancy Pelosi and the rest of her extremist team of Democrats must go! _**

_Nancy Pelosi's Deputy Whip is G.K. Butterfield- my far-left opponent. He does not represent us- he's never even represented half the voters in my newly-redrawn swing district!_

I will stop Nancy Pelosi from impeaching the President OR from packing the court! [Can you help me win with the President?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g)

I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional, and his Supreme Court picks have been superb!

**Pelosi's Democrats are going psycho right now- just frothing at the mouth! I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and taking him out sends a strong message to Pelosi about her abuses of power! **

**Butterfield is an AWFUL campaigner, and I've fought him tooth and nail to this point. I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you!**

[If you want the President to perform his duties and lead our country, I need your help to beat Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! 2020 is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield's record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h0Z06F1by3Nxmng&b=I9o5YWslhjLCJPR8iUXJ_g) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional, and his Supreme Court picks have been superb! Pelosi's Democrats are going psycho right now- just frothing at the mouth! I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and taking him out sends a strong message to Pelosi about her abuses of power! Butterfield is an AWFUL campaigner, and I've fought him tooth and nail to this point. I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you! Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! 2020 is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield's record is awful, but to replace him I ! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. body:

---
| |
# **Montana Stockgrowers Association Endorses ****Troy Downing**
**The Montana Stockgrowers Association endorses Troy Downing for State Auditor and the MT Board of Land Commissioners. Stockgrowers know that Downing supports farmers and ranchers.** _Bozeman, MT:_ The Montana Stockgrowers Association endorses Troy Downing for this vital Land Board seat. The Stockgrowers know that Downing will continue to have meaningful and respectful conversations with ALL Montanans while making decisions regarding our State Trust Lands. **_“Our rural communities and farming and ranching industry are not only vital to Montana, but vital to the Nation. I am humbled and honored to be endorsed by both the Farm Bureau and Stockgrowers.”_** states Downing. _Stewardship is key._

_Help Protect Rural Montana. Donate Today to Troy's campaign! _
---
| [Protect Our Ag Community](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=de3463f53a&e=a212bb87cc "Protect Our Ag Community")
---
| Downing will continue to protect access, respect private property rights, and ensure we do everything we can to support our farmers and ranchers with these vital resources and raise much-needed funding for our schools. Multiple-use and sustained yield are key tenets to Downing’s plans. He will make sure to look at these unique and finite treasures and protect what must be protected, graze where it makes sense, and develop natural resources where this makes sense. Sustained yield is the concept of long-term plans rather than giving in to short-term windfall. To make sure we are true stewards of these precious resources and manage them so that they continue to support our rural and agricultural industries, produce vitally needed funds for education, and continue to make us smile when we look out our windows. **_“I look forward to working with Stockgrowers, our farmers and ranchers, and ALL Montanans as we move the ball forward- supporting critical industry, funding education, and preserving our precious state resources.” _**
---

---

subject: Action plan for fighting corruption
body:
I grew up believing in democracy. And not just any kind of democracy, but the particular brand of American democracy that | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ef439275d850/action-plan-for-fighting-corruption?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
**I grew up believing in democracy. And not just any kind of democracy, but the particular brand of American democracy that prides itself on giving everyone a voice. **

To hear President Trump repeatedly question our electoral process, to call into question our very democracy, and to admit he’s intent on clinging to his power is a further demonstration of this administration’s willingness to descend into corruption.

This is a transparent effort to undermine the election from someone who recognizes he is unlikely to maintain his power, and it is a distraction from the pressing problems facing far too many people today. **People are hungry, people are worried, and the pandemic continues to rage despite political posturing and manufactured drama. **

**The President needs to get back to work and Republican legislators like Adam Kinzinger need to hold him accountable for doing so.**

In Congress, I’ll fight for comprehensive campaign finance reform, expanding both voting and ballot access, and abolishing the electoral college. I evaluate every policy I take a position on against a set of values and the primary value is: does this restore power to the people?

Trump doesn’t. Kinzinger won’t.

I will.

We are $31,000 short of our goal for this month. [Can you make a $25, $50, $100, or $250 donation today?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7f93698b85&e=140a9b81e7) Democracy depends on electing a critical mass of people like me, and I need you.

Dani
