name: Gina Raimondo
subject: clearing the air
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Over the last few months, state and school leaders have worked 24/7 to safely reopen our schools. That work would not have been possible without the input of public health experts, from pediatricians to epidemiologists and more. Throughout this crisis, we've relied on the data, and we've put our trust in scientists to guide our decisions. I know there have been a lot of questions about what schools can do to provide sufficient air circulation in classrooms. Today, I want you to hear directly from Dr. Erin Bromage, one of the scientists we consulted on school reopening, and Dr. Jim McDonald from the Rhode Island Department of Health about simple steps schools can take to improve airflow and keep students and staff safe from COVID-19.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hhg113AwjxKrErSA7Al3EOyylN7G7cmWRRaVKI2P3H1rd99ThuOkC7Y11EFjQCuvI5b5jB2D3-mBe4Gl0mNzkiZe5vMrh8JnPh828lOO1dPJU36GTTF8hzylWwJGGBpWiffhNmzuyZ2hRSvCy19oxN9EnqjqJmJc9EugUznTw5Fm6P7boKBOsGQpCk3SySxCC0Tli7_ap50=&c=C4iwUld9g7Q9Pm24C--zqlqJu01bpJcXb-5ksVLLjqexWXvh_zfFTw==&ch=re5qb6QwObwhYv7QMuRexKhr_KvymQ-TVccv9F5yAZrmZpqGXxX4cA==)
---
| Based on the expertise of Dr. Bromage and others that we consulted, as well as a recent report from Harvard's School of Public Health, we have put together a useful [webpage](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hhg113AwjxKrErSA7Al3EOyylN7G7cmWRRaVKI2P3H1rd99ThuOkC7Y11EFjQCuvV5weB_b0AOVaOuNBFVQIHNFIxYuNP90GwdV5WXBkyeHygBv6NGI-damHW2MjuEGsaZSXXvxtQPmHhcIZzSSokQ==&c=C4iwUld9g7Q9Pm24C--zqlqJu01bpJcXb-5ksVLLjqexWXvh_zfFTw==&ch=re5qb6QwObwhYv7QMuRexKhr_KvymQ-TVccv9F5yAZrmZpqGXxX4cA==) with data on the effectiveness of every different approach to address airflow, from opening windows, to box fans, to HEPA filters. These experts looked at data of what's called "air changes per hour" - or how often air is circulated in and out of a certain room - to determine how best to address COVID-19 in indoor settings.
The science indicates that, given the size of a typical classroom, you want to see at least four air changes per hour. They found that opening a single window just six inches provides 5 air changes per hour or more, and adding a box fan to that window increases that number to over 12. In fact, this was one of the most effective approaches there is. We've also added a tool on the webpage in which you can input the size of the room and calculate the effectiveness of a given approach in each situation.
For those of you who are interested in what the data and science says about airflow, please visit [health.ri.gov/airflow](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hhg113AwjxKrErSA7Al3EOyylN7G7cmWRRaVKI2P3H1rd99ThuOkC7Y11EFjQCuvV5weB_b0AOVaOuNBFVQIHNFIxYuNP90GwdV5WXBkyeHygBv6NGI-damHW2MjuEGsaZSXXvxtQPmHhcIZzSSokQ==&c=C4iwUld9g7Q9Pm24C--zqlqJu01bpJcXb-5ksVLLjqexWXvh_zfFTw==&ch=re5qb6QwObwhYv7QMuRexKhr_KvymQ-TVccv9F5yAZrmZpqGXxX4cA==) to learn more.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hhg113AwjxKrErSA7Al3EOyylN7G7cmWRRaVKI2P3H1rd99ThuOkC7Y11EFjQCuviVKvWHA-nLPLNKoyhtb9iMfz5PRxBNfXGOB0E1NHfDbfvO-OJt3vlvj6WwX-8xEHnBHPczjYzmgA-fY16TLgYti9j-rhMjYgX37zQtPsPxfD4qRGjRdSDW0o6OXFI-Vq-LpuMMYsb_KQS0g7WoKypxXhejoiyj9ePVZMa8XSH11371rWw700aQZ4IGiQ_dPXe6UHbdB-dnD9P3LRMnpf8t17jC2FyWbEipLJaxF0P8B2T1oA_cegWkQDB5-U7vnEHQFWb9AlMNk=&c=C4iwUld9g7Q9Pm24C--zqlqJu01bpJcXb-5ksVLLjqexWXvh_zfFTw==&ch=re5qb6QwObwhYv7QMuRexKhr_KvymQ-TVccv9F5yAZrmZpqGXxX4cA==).

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I'm fighting like hell for our health care heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
and all Texans struggling during the COVID-19 pandemic.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa50c4/2818699778/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

I know that after months of dealing with the new reality created by the COVID-19 pandemic, Texas families are feeling a lot of fear, uncertainty, and anger. As a mother and Texan, I'm fiercely protective of the safety of our families and communities.

And as a combat veteran, I have my eye on our mission: protecting folks from the continuing spread of this disease and the devastating economic fallout. My service in the military taught me that when the unexpected hits, it's critical to stay focused on solutions.

That's why I kicked off my Texas Tough Tour talking to frontline health care workers and Texans who are dealing with the COVID-19 pandemic. They are heroes, and their stories and experiences have helped shape my platform. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513b/2818699778/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=10")
---
I've seen first-hand that health care costs are out of control, and I firmly believe that every American has the right to quality, affordable health care. That's part of the reason why I'm running for Senate -- we need a senator who prioritizes health care, especially right now.

Senator Cornyn doesn't. Why? You have to follow the money. He cares about protecting the bottom lines of his corporate PAC donors, not the health and well-being of folks like you. That's why he voted to gut protections for millions of Texans with pre-existing conditions and allow insurance companies to charge older Texans more for coverage.

Sen. Cornyn led the charge against the Affordable Care Act and voted to repeal it twenty times. Now he's standing by as his allies try to dismantle it in court -- in the midst of a pandemic.

**And this part makes me absolutely outraged: as a member of the Senate Intelligence Committee, he knew how bad the COVID-19 pandemic would be and played it down, wasting crucial time he could have been spending trying to protect Texans.**

As your senator, I won't cower to the special interests -- I don't take _any_ money from corporate PACs. I will fight to make Medicare available to all who want it, lower prescription drug costs, protect people with pre-existing conditions -- and I'll never let insurance companies call the shots.

If you're ready to get on board, now is the time. **[Please donate what you can to give us the resources we need to defeat Sen. Cornyn and stop allowing him to put Texans' health care at risk.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513b/2818699778/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513a/2818699778/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa5139/2818699778/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa5138/2818699778/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513f/2818699778/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513e/2818699778/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__")**
Our health care is on the ballot this November, and unlike Sen. Cornyn, I'm committed to fighting to ensure every Texan has access to affordable, quality health care.

\-- MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513b/2818699778/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200924.2nd__2172__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513d/2818699778/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2172&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa513c/2818699778/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0f/7f51f7bc/45ba6b52/4efa5133/2818699778/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").

body:
Is David Perdue in favor of Trump stealing the Election? |
---
**_"Get rid of the ballots and you'll have a very -- we'll have a very peaceful -- there won't be a transfer frankly, there'll be a continuation."_ ** **\- The President of the United States**
Friend, these are not the words of a democratic leader. **_These are the words of a wannabe dictator._**

Friend,

In case you didn't see, our campaign got some exciting news!

**The Manchester Police Patrolman’s Association and the Manchester Association of Police Supervisors endorsed Matt Mowers for Congress in NH-01.**
|
---
**[Click here to join New Hampshire police officers in supporting Mowers for Congress.>>>](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=4eed71db742042268da4b351b9771832&_e=tYzQrrz1Y2pQ3nmXccvuIKdp016PLb2vyOvBXGbIzM2B-5mbQGeRJH0-3SOxVN7lYt3l1JJT21e_TWbcPYEhnzt1xtq5KhvN-8tw9CfiivX5vruWUYQThh8UOlroKwHYLe63ib4-4dSvrZX-KrXEUnUX1_pBMEEhCpIG5Cd3JWjxYmZZlCFavcliQk3_tuTd--VMvSgALDwxPmnC79iTQGa0yzlepzYFKBN1ry0bCTZwDDSIVQCw8Xqx_dB9Qsa9zhHsFg868487AMvtl9eVbMvPgQujuOVRwTKjiO8cL2nNam4etCRgVuko5Tf6tCTSo2vLNPnW8UAqAWoBgg8DzbeREQGzwukT4Fm5fKXa12tJ9S58jhjrVngV2NeNoF9hiCOVpFp3VfI20s6Ur_AuIuovLhrKc_HFTC-N-J9DZwIdgQ1RiEBgD8PUD73V9yyplQxHLQl3oDlZLdALFU6aXk2pS7NLy0GscaTEsJ9cCA1Czzp3firmpH4TQqeIXAmR)**

[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=4eed71db742042268da4b351b9771832&_e=tYzQrrz1Y2pQ3nmXccvuIKdp016PLb2vyOvBXGbIzM2B-5mbQGeRJH0-3SOxVN7lYt3l1JJT21e_TWbcPYEhnzt1xtq5KhvN-8tw9CfiivX5vruWUYQThh8UOlroKwHYLe63ib4-4dSvrZX-KrXEUnUX1_pBMEEhCpIG5Cd3JWjxYmZZlCFavcliQk3_tuTd--VMvSgALDwxPmnC79iTQGa0yzlepzYFKBN1ry0bCTZwDDSIVQCw8Xqx_dB9Qsa9zhHsFg868487AMvtl9eVbMvPgQujuOVRwTKjiO8cL2m6h0C8okm_S4K9v5SbP-9I1Hi_MzZj_c6v7wqein640yoNedFle5cK-iF2hFz_t5V5x6VbNtKmhsLEyv1cIx-yakrxIbZwhUS8-Bjbelg0AWpCo6MAfamvrwrORLKEa58GQAXyJ-KXHVzCLoNOJlatphyROF16_g-bUiiC5RNgaedqk_X94OPpQ-Rl5HKQUhlP6x4O9wwBbR530HA9fkfG)
|
---
Take a look at what they had to say about Mowers:
|
---
_**“As politicians across the country attack our police departments, Matt Mowers has had our backs. When politicians in Washington voted to remove qualified immunity from police officers, Mowers stood with us. When others wanted to defund the police, Mowers defended us...We are proud to support Matt Mowers for Congress.”**_
|
---
This is _HUGE_ for our campaign, especially since they endorsed our Democrat opponent Chris Pappas in 2018.

Now more than ever, police officers need to know that their representative in Washington has their back. Instead of fighting to make sure our brave men and women in blue have what they need to keep our communities safe, Chris Pappas has been using them as a political punching bag...

Chris has beaten them down for months, and they’ve had all they can take. So now they are throwing their support behind Matt. **We could not be more honored to receive their endorsements.**

name: Team Warner
subject: Donald Trump is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Trump in Newport News
|
---

| | Derek --

Donald Trump is holding a campaign rally in Newport News tomorrow night.

With early voting already underway in Virginia, Trump is clearly targeting Virginia and predicting a Republican victory in November. Make no mistake: Trump thinks he can turn the Commonwealth red. His well-funded Trump Victory initiative continues to hold grassroots organizing events across the Commonwealth, in an effort to flip Virginia red and erase the progress we've made.

If we're going to keep Virginia blue by electing Joe Biden, re-electing Mark Warner, and electing Democrats down the ticket, we need to step up our efforts to reach Virginia voters. **Can you pitch in today to help Keep Mark Warner in the Senate and keep Virginia blue?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e7/1677426535/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?express_lane=true&refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5") | [DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e6/1677426535/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?express_lane=true&refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")
[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e5/1677426535/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?express_lane=true&refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25") | [DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e4/1677426535/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?express_lane=true&refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")
[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e3/1677426535/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?express_lane=true&refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100") | [CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e2/1677426535/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=express_lane_other")
There's a real path to flipping the Senate this year -- but we can't get there without holding onto seats like Mark's. With just 40 days until Election Day, we're going to need all hands on deck. If Donald Trump and Mark's GOP opponent are predicting victory, we need to double down to make sure that doesn't happen.

**[Please consider investing in a blue Virginia with a contribution before Trump's Newport News rally.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dabf/53d9897e/5597052a/1c8819e1/1677426535/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-red?refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__816__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for all of your support!

-- Team Warner

subject: Standing in the way
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?refcode=092420AM)
| | Friend, Today, Mike Pence and Ivanka Trump returned to Minnesota to host a "Cops for Trump" event in Minneapolis -- where George Floyd was murdered and just a day after justice for Breonna Taylor was denied. Pence and Ivanka talked about the civil unrest, but glossed over the systemic issues that caused it in the first place. To add insult to injury, Minnesota Republicans have repeatedly stood in the way of much needed funding that businesses need to rebuild and Trump even denied us disaster relief funding as "punishment." Minnesotans know better. We see through this attempt to distract and divide. If we want real change and real recovery, we need to grow our majority in the Minnesota House, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House -- that all starts here at the local level. Will you help us bring our country together from the grassroots? Your contribution today will help us make strategic plans as we head into the homestretch: _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=092420AM) [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=092420AM) [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=092420AM) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=092420AM) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=092420AM) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Trump and Minnesota Republicans abandoned Minnesota when we needed help and are exploiting our pain for the benefit of their campaign -- and that's something we can never forget. Together, we can reject Trump's politics of division and come together to build a better future where all Minnesotans are safe in their communities, no exceptions. Thank you, House DFL Team [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/U2SXWX1JFeuAdIh73PgTxtOW4Mw6kE1wZqGWlC2jqbs=/5WrBC9jEyrtJVm0ByMn4lnVLnkTAI38It0E5wpAa6NE=?refcode=092420AM)

name: Shedd Info
subject: Is Tom really a moderate? You decide >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Tom O’Halleran claims that he’s really a moderate who’s not beholden to special interests or his liberal bosses in Washington, but his actions say otherwise. [ ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7f400983635b4c6384a19ac062b0ee03&_e=tp0ISMXaIiLOfN52tE-uNftAOm2fbc6Bb-6MikQtO1BkbRZaOgEqlqNaAK-wePTmPY65pq0vpvEWk7NnnOSkoEEySTUnJ2GSj8n2HAd-T3sVhmnD7gW67oaGwFYE3LULu1U7rt9ulKyrYme9aanSooslXz_-ZvCX9hcrD1FQUQ7JENHYmrjFz_-bMxZhMCPjAKjIL3Cf3Dlo_v4hclQUF0En8Gjlkm82r7FZOb9PJUZgPAVLCbL4R-SCPO2y5gaqcjs5wVxzx_9i7kgM6yUgi5LEcTEzE8zLEiFX7OmhuDTaxY9djjM0KEhP160zMRcfmd3uhcXbXOcUlXwZFVTUCjdwZ8wnhNNXw9XoVUovM0WD4R7Rf5U3XCerdqqUh0HTJdnuMO3jgvy7Dm0txFjbz7Ksud1vCsoZk7ih4_a9m80%3D) Tom can claim that he’s a moderate all day, but the facts are in, and he’s just as progressive as Nancy Pelosi -- _**he voted with her 97% of the time.**_ They really are just two peas in a pod, both far out of touch with AZ-01. subject: hey there

body:
Friend,

I am reaching out to you one last time before tonight’s midnight deadline, because we are so close to reaching our goal. We knew that our $20,000 goal would be a tough goal to reach in just a matter of days, but you all have shown time and again that our campaign is stronger than our opponent’s -- powered by the people, not corporate special interests.

We have just a few hours left to hit our goal and ensure we have the resources we need to get out our message to voters who began receiving their Vote by Mail ballots earlier today.

We are just $692 short of our goal and any amount you can donate will make a real difference. Please, before midnight, make a contribution using this secure link to help provide the resources we need to win: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19520280/253434563/1073285021?refcode2=86fb0242-c6fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=fe07cd66-a6fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=86fb0242-c6fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=092420-es-vbm-drop-series-8-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZiMDI0Mi1jNmZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYNTLJbxj4rLpELw89RNQh4qx8es9SE4OodM1MNsRKw=)**

Together, we can flip this district from red to blue, turn Florida blue, and unite our country.

Thank you for your continued support.

Margaret

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19520282/253434565/-1805212762?refcode=092420-es-vbm-drop-series-8-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZiMDI0Mi1jNmZlLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYNTLJbxj4rLpELw89RNQh4qx8es9SE4OodM1MNsRKw=&emci=fe07cd66-a6fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=86fb0242-c6fe-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)**

name: Senate Update (via Rosen For Nevada)
subject: defend these Democratic seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
**NEWSWEEK: "These Two Democratic Senators Are in Danger of Losing Their Seats"**
Team,
According to the latest from _Newsweek_ , Democratic Senators Gary Peters and Doug Jones are the two most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election in 2020. The GOP are targeting these Democratic champions, hoping to turn these states red and keep their GOP Senate majority.
If we're going to flip the Senate, we need to hold on to every Democratic seat. We simply can't afford to lose these fights in Michigan and Alabama -- _that 's why we need all hands on deck._
And now, with the Supreme Court on the line, the fight for the Senate is even more important.
**[Pitch in $5 right now to defend Democratic Senate seats in Michigan and Alabama.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200923-senate-slate?source=em200923i_4625&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
There's no way around it -- these two races are some of the toughest for Democrats on the 2020 map. But victories here are so consequential -- because we can't lose any ground as we fight to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell's Republican majority.
We need this grassroots team's support more than ever -- can we count on you to step up now?
[**Make a $5 contribution -- or whatever you can -- to keep these pivotal seats blue.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200923-senate-slate?source=em200923i_4625&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Team Rosen

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200923-senate-slate?source=em200923i_4625&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d8978/4fbb2af3/20a891aa/5e8052ba/2483625180/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---

Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126

subject: Today is critical
body:
Today is the final day of our fundraising period, and we need to finish strong. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/today-is-critical-9-24-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ec175d4b26&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends --

I wasn’t planning to write you today. But my team just updated me... and we’re so close.

We only need to raise $4,215 today to reach our critical end-of-period goal!

With JUST HOURS to go, [will you chip in $5, $20, or $250 before midnight tonight?](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=51741d1abe&e=4f010155df) This is our last fundraising deadline before voting starts.

Every dollar we raise will help us close strong and WIN the election!
---
| [🕛 Deadline TONIGHT! Donate now >>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=84b27b586a&e=4f010155df "🕛 Deadline TONIGHT! Donate now >>")
---
| We have just 19 days until Early Voting starts.

That’s why it’s so important that we reach our fundraising goal today.

_Every $5 will help us send text reminders about the election to another 100 voters._

_Every $10 we raise will help us reach another 100 voters via Facebook._

I believe this race will very likely go down to the wire. We can’t let up now.

**Every vote is going to count...[and you can see the direct impact your support today will make!](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=fd9d104988&e=4f010155df)**

I’m running for the Texas House to fix our healthcare system and build our economy back.

We need a proven real-world LEADER in Austin, who is ready to get to work and deliver results on the issues that impact our families and businesses. Let’s work together to put a PHARMACIST in the HOUSE.

Please, [chip in now to help us reach more voters!](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2792423862&e=4f010155df)

Thank you, in advance, for ANY contribution you’re able to help with.

For Texas,
---
|
---
| Will Douglas
_Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113_
---
| [🕛 Deadline TONIGHT! Donate now >>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d104bfe10a&e=4f010155df "🕛 Deadline TONIGHT! Donate now >>")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: You're invited: A special event with me and Ed Markey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Next Tuesday at 6:30 p.m. Eastern, I'm teaming up with my friend and partner in the Senate, Ed Markey, to host a virtual grassroots fundraiser. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b9/45c30650/1c1c7dc81/66e8e57c/294421260/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm really looking forward to this:

Next Tuesday at 6:30 p.m. Eastern, I'm teaming up with my friend and partner in the Senate, Ed Markey, to host a virtual grassroots fundraiser.

The money we raise for my campaign will help elect Warren Democrats across the country. And with our last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of this election season just days away, there's never been a more critically important moment to pitch in.

**[I hope you'll be able to join me and Ed Markey at 6:30 p.m. Eastern, next Tuesday, September 29. Please chip in $2 or any amount to join the conversation.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b9/45c30650/1c1c7dc81/66e8e57f/294421260/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtLXNlcHRmciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMTlGX0VPUV9FV0RfRV8yMDIwMDkyNF9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em-septfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV19F_EOQ_EWD_E_20200924_V1S2_P")**

Now, you might remember that next Tuesday is also the night of the first presidential debate.

But don't worry: we'll wrap up our event in plenty of time for you to watch the debate, cheer on Joe Biden, and throw small objects at the screen while Donald Trump rants and raves. And you'll know that earlier in the evening, you've helped make sure that Democrats will win big up and down the ballot.

Ed and I will talk about how we're fighting to win the White House, take back the Senate, hold onto and expand our Democratic House majority, and the important big, structural changes we need to make come 2021.

We can do this -- we can end this dark chapter of our nation's history.

**But Warren Democrats in tight races across the country are counting on grassroots supporters like you to power them to victory.

And it's all hands on deck to hit our big fundraising goal before the powerfully important September 30 FEC fundraising deadline.**

**[So if you're able to pitch in, please make a donation at this link right now to reserve your spot at my virtual grassroots fundraiser with Ed Markey next Tuesday evening. body:
Boarding now: Donald Trump |
---
Did you see this, friend?!?

Clearly visits to Georgia by Eric Trump, Don Jr., Ivanka, and Bill Barr have only deepened Donald Trump's struggles here -- **so Donald is now coming himself.**

**_For a photo op with my opponent, David Perdue, "Trump's favorite senator."_**

But friend: Trump is fighting a losing battle here.

Georgians are wide awake to his catastrophic failure. His indifference to the lives and health of ordinary people. His narcissism and corruption.

And Democrats are SURGING in Georgia. In 2018, the GOP's margin of victory was just 55,000 votes. Now, 750,000 new voters are registered and eligible to vote in Georgia.

**[Can you rush a donation before Trump arrives tomorrow to show him that we have MASSIVE grassroots support for a Democratic victory here in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fdf/5b2c1286/3aab5f74/25f3923f/3187518645/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_visit_k")**

Let's welcome the President by showing our grassroots strength and our commitment to defeating him.

THANK YOU!

Jon

Sent from my iPhone

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Trump Flight Confirmation Alert | Jon Ossoff for Senate
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 23, 2020
**Subject:** Flight #2020GA to Atlanta

Donald Trump is panicking, friend!

Last week, he dispatched Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. to Georgia.

Then, he sent Ivanka Trump and Bill Barr to Georgia earlier this week!

**And if all that wasn't enough,_Donald Trump himself_ is now heading to Georgia _THIS FRIDAY_ for a photo op with _David Perdue!!!_**

[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fdf/5b2c1286/3aab5f74/25f39245/3187518645/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_visit_img_k")
**[Friend, can you make a donation before Trump lands in Georgia? We need to show Trump that visiting Georgia isn't going to salvage his dwindling support here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fdf/5b2c1286/3aab5f74/25f3923f/3187518645/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_visit_k")**
| [DONATE BEFORE HE ARRIVES](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fdf/5b2c1286/3aab5f74/25f3923f/3187518645/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_visit_k")
---

Why is he doing all of this? He's **_terrified_** of losing Georgia -- and he knows that's a real possibility.

Recent polling has Donald Trump TIED with Joe Biden in Georgia, and Democrat Jon Ossoff TIED with Trump's "favorite Senator," David Perdue!

**Democrats keep gaining on Republicans here, and Trump knows the path to the White House runs straight through Georgia._He can't win without this state._**

It's do or die for Republicans here -- but for Georgia Democrats, we're just getting started. _In the June primary, Georgia Democrats broke voter turnout records and OUTNUMBERED Republicans._

**That's why Trump and Mitch McConnell are funneling so much money and effort into Georgia, friend, and that's exactly why we can't let up.**

**[Chip in $20 right now to help us keep our momentum going.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fdf/5b2c1286/3aab5f74/25f39244/3187518645/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_visit_k&amount=20")**
| [CHIP IN $20 NOW >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fdf/5b2c1286/3aab5f74/25f39244/3187518645/VEsHBA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_24_trump_visit_k&amount=20")
---

Thanks for doing what you can.

Team Ossoff

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Sign the petition -- Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (<a href="http://demandprogress
body: Peter, We need to fight with everything we have to stop Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell from filling RBG's spot on the Supreme Court. Too many news stories suggest there is nothing Democrats can do; they are wrong. Please read the email below and [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1001&akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t ]sign the petition. The single most important person who can stop Trump appointing a Justice to replace RBG is Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer. He needs to hear from you and the Senators who represent you. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1002&akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t ]Please sign Demand Progress's petition right away. -- Zephyr Teachout -------------------------------------------------------------------------- The death of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg on Friday evening comes as a shock and a tragedy. We honor her forty years of pathbreaking service on the federal bench, including 27 years on the Supreme Court. Her dying wish was that her replacement not be confirmed until a new president has been installed.^1 Mitch McConnell just said he will not respect that wish and will instead hold a vote on Trump's nominee. But Senate Democrats have the power to stop them and save the Supreme Court. The Senate runs on unanimous consent. If a single Senator objects to anything, even routine procedure, everything grinds to a halt. That is what Senate Democrats must do: block unanimous consent on every single thing for the rest of the year. It may be our best chance to stop Trump and McConnell. Will you help? [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1003&akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t ]Sign the petition: Shut down the Senate and stop Trump and McConnell from picking RBG's successor! This is a frankly terrifying moment. But there is a path forward. Senate Democrats have the power and the leverage to potentially prevent Trump and McConnell from deciding who will succeed Justice Ginsburg on the Supreme Court. Senate Democrats can block every motion, force every bill to be read in full, and use a wide range of parliamentary tactics to shut down the Senate between now and January, when new Senators and the president are inaugurated. The Senate still has work ahead, including bills Trump and McConnell want to pass, including bills to fund the government. It's time to block all of it. McConnell and Trump see this as their best, and perhaps last, opportunity to further stack the federal courts with extreme right-wing nominees who will cripple the next president. As tough a moment as this is, we have a chance to stop them -- if Democrats act firmly to shut down the Senate now. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/sign/rbg-scotus-zt/?t=1004&akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t ]Add your name now: Tell Democrats to shut down the Senate and stop Trump and McConnell from picking RBG's successor! Thank you for taking action in this urgent moment, David and the team at Demand Progress [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/32965?t=1005&akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t ]DONATE Sources: 1. NBC News, "Ruth Bader Ginsburg's dying wish: Not to have Donald Trump choose replacement," [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/32961?t=1006&akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t ]September 18, 2020. ---------- PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (DemandProgress.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Join our online community on Facebook or Twitter. You can unsubscribe from this list at any time: http://act.demandprogress.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=27123%2E8104458%2Ewll70t

name: Tom Cotton
subject: PETITION: Investigate the funding of ANTIFA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I won't stand by and allow ANTIFA to be ignored, or worse yet, protected, by the Democrat establishment that would prefer violence in our communities. Help me restore order and keep our communities safe. Help me stop ANTIFA and expose their deep-funded efforts.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Have you noticed that Antifa is causing destruction across this country and in each city, their methods are the same? They dress in black, use umbrellas, throw Molotov cocktails, and burn down buildings.

All we hear from the mainstream media is that these are random "peaceful protests" from average Americans. **But this is a lie. And now we have evidence showing they are well armed with supplies for these riots.**

[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

Just yesterday a U-Haul distributed gear and supplies to the groups of people who went on to riot and cause damage across the city.

And in Portland, there are numerous organizations that help fund the costs of these rioters--and help keep them out of jail.

It's time for the Department of Justice to **investigate who is funding Antifa.**

[**SIGN MY PETITION TO INVESTIGATE ANTIFA 'S FUNDING**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter, if you're sick of the violence in our cities and agree we should hold these rioters and their organizers responsible then [**sign my petition to investigate the funding of Antifa 's actions.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The media refuses to even acknowledge the obvious violence. A CNN reporter at one of the riots went so far as to say, "I'm not going to say it's been peaceful but it hasn't quite been violent."
* **Assaulting civilians and officers with baseball bats is not "peaceful protest."
**
* **Throwing Molotov cocktails is not "peaceful protest." **

* **And well-prepared, well-funded, and well-organized groups of rioters is not "spontaneous peaceful protest." **

The refusal of the media to call out Antifa is helping the violence continue. We must restore order and keep our communities safe. We have to investigate who is funding Antifa.

[**SIGN MY PETITION TO INVESTIGATE ANTIFA 'S FUNDING **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I won't stand by and allow Antifa to be ignored, or worse yet, protected by the Democrat establishment that would prefer violence in our communities. Help me restore order and keep our communities safe. [**Help me stop Antifa and expose their deep-funded efforts.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NDA4MjYS1&kn=21&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjA1MDU5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

clean_body: I won't stand by and allow ANTIFA to be ignored, or worse yet, protected, by the Democrat establishment that would prefer violence in our communities. Help me restore order and keep our communities safe. Help me stop ANTIFA and expose their deep-funded efforts. Peter, Have you noticed that Antifa is causing destruction across this country and in each city, their methods are the same? They dress in black, use umbrellas, throw Molotov cocktails, and burn down buildings. All we hear from the mainstream media is that these are random "peaceful protests" from average Americans. But this is a lie. And now we have evidence showing they are well armed with supplies for these riots. ** Just yesterday a U-Haul distributed gear and supplies to the groups of people who went on to riot and cause damage across the city. And in Portland, there are numerous organizations that help fund the costs of these rioters--and help keep them out of jail. It's time for the Department of Justice to investigate who is funding Antifa. Peter, if you're sick of the violence in our cities and agree we should hold these rioters and their organizers responsible then The media refuses to even acknowledge the obvious violence. A CNN reporter at one of the riots went so far as to say, "I'm not going to say it's been peaceful but it hasn't quite been violent." Assaulting civilians and officers with baseball bats is not "peaceful protest." Throwing Molotov cocktails is not "peaceful protest." And well-prepared, well-funded, and well-organized groups of rioters is not "spontaneous peaceful protest." The refusal of the media to call out Antifa is helping the violence continue. We must restore order and keep our communities safe. We have to investigate who is funding Antifa. I won't stand by and allow Antifa to be ignored, or worse yet, protected by the Democrat establishment that would prefer violence in our communities. Help me restore order and keep our communities safe. In service, Tom Cotton ** | | | | | | Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane Suite 200 Little Rock, AR 72202 Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. | Derek,
As you may know, New Hampshire Trump Victory has had a ton of recent excitement. In the last 10 days alone, the Granite State has been visited by John Pence, Eric Trump, and Vice President Mike Pence. Today, Donald Trump Jr. joined us for an event in North Conway! Throughout these events, we’ve had the pleasure of meeting countless supporters eager to get involved with helping the President’s campaign for re-election. But what we’ve been most thrilled to see is the energy and interest from Hispanics here in the state. So as we celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month, we are excited to announce our very first **Latinos for Trump** event in New Hampshire! Come and join the Trump Victory Team **this****Saturday** in Nashua for a Latinos for Trump MAGA Meet-up and Potluck! Candidate for New Hampshire Congressional District 2, Steve Negron will help us kick things off. Bring your friends, a dish to share, and join us in **"Gathering for Freedom"** as we work together to flip New Hampshire red! We will also have a stream playing of the President announcing his Supreme Court pick, expected at 5 PM. For further information and to RSVP, sign up below to attend this Saturday, from **5 PM-****7PM** , at our **Trump Victory Nahua Field Office** on **191 Main St., Nashua, NH 03060**. [RSVP HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTE3NTYwNzE0MDE1ODA3MTY2JmM9ZzZkNCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTY0MDk3NTImZD1nMG81ajdw.8uZkBpBTVCbMXPJdTP88o2a-3yLLdFE1q4Ib7lSDgss) Let’s Keep America Great,

name: Christy Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

If I could pick one word to describe how I'm feeling in the last weeks of this election, it's this: Uncertainty.

Uncertain, because not only is the presidency at stake along with Congress, but now, with an open Supreme Court seat, the unbelievably high stakes just got higher. And then yesterday, Trump refused to pledge a peaceful transfer of power. It's deeply unsettling.

But we can only control what we can control.

**What has stayed constant, from day one of this race, is my steadfast determination to be the voice CA-25 needs in Congress.** And Mike Garcia has made it clear what kind of congressman he is -- we cannot afford to give him a full term to simply rubber stamp Trump's reckless agenda.

**We're down to the final six days before our most important FEC deadline yet, our last end-of-quarter before Election Day** \-- and we're going to be making important spending decisions for the last month of this campaign. Really, every donation -- no matter how big or small -- could tip the scales.

**[So I'm asking you, Peter, because it's never been more important: Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can right now so we can meet our 3rd quarter digital fundraising goal of $900,000?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7e12/2999728458/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7e13/2999728458/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7eec/2999728458/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7eed/2999728458/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7eee/2999728458/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7eef/2999728458/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7e12/2999728458/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in")
Running for office is a truly humbling experience because you never know what can happen. And boy... we really had no idea what we were getting into when we launched this campaign.

We had no idea our country would face an unprecedented pandemic that would completely change how we campaign and how voters would cast their ballots. We had no idea our opponents would sink to some truly horrific lows. We had no idea everyone from Joe Biden to Kamala Harris to Hillary Clinton to Barack Obama would rally to support us.

We have hustled our hearts out every single step of the way.

**And as we face the fast-approaching end of this general election, we can't afford to falter. We have to keep fighting our hearts out.** And we just won't be able to compete in these final months if we fall short of our end-of-quarter goal.

**[You've had my back every step of the way, Peter. I'm asking you to have it again today -- please chip in $5 or more so we can reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. We only have six days left to close the gap.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7e12/2999728458/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in")**

Thank you,

\-- Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7e12/2999728458/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7e12/2999728458/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjRfRU9RMV9pbiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200924_EOQ1_in")

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcce/29776869/89e5aa9/569e7eea/2999728458/VEsHBg/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

In just 1 hour, my good friend and future Congresswoman, Mariannette Miller-Meeks is going to take the debate stage against Rita Hart. Iowa's Second Congressional District has the opportunity to elect a conservative warrior and proven results getter in Mariannette. She's cut taxes in Des Moines and taken care of our veterans. [Will you chip in $10 to stand with us?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=d733dcadad&e=16fac31a0f) I want to be able to show Dr. Miller-Meeks the list of supporters we got right after she gets off the stage.
---
| [DONATE $10](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=a843b8390f&e=16fac31a0f "DONATE $10")
---
| Running for congress isn't easy. It's incredibly difficult. Dr. Miller-Meeks has been a servant leader her entire life, from serving our country to serving patients, she's been there for US. Let's be there for her.

You can watch the debate [here](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=8282e4b4f0&e=16fac31a0f).

Ashley Hinson

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: President Trump just unveiled his America First Healthcare Plan
body:
President Trump traveled to Charlotte, North Carolina, this afternoon where he just unveiled his America First Healthcare Plan. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8c9155d1f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 24, 2020
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: President Trump just unveiled his America First Healthcare Plan**

**President Trump traveled** to Charlotte, North Carolina, this afternoon where he just unveiled his America First Healthcare Plan.

**“We will ensure** the highest standard of care anywhere in the world: cutting-edge treatments, state-of-the-art medicine, groundbreaking cures, and true health security for you and your loved ones,” the President said.

**🎬**[**President Trump: Better care at a lower cost with more choice!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b497fac553&e=3ee4985eea)

**The America First plan** has three goals: more choice, lower costs, and better care. It includes protections for pre-existing conditions, measures to stop surprise medical bills, and rules to guarantee price transparency so patients aren’t left completely in the dark.

**The result** is that Americans will have more control over their own healthcare dollars rather than ceding power to Washington politicians or powerful corporations.

**Unlike socialized medicine,** President Trump’s plan puts working families first with:
* **MORE CHOICE:** Patients will be in charge of their care, not bureaucrats at some faraway Federal agency. When President Trump took office, more than _half_ of U.S. counties offered plans from only a single insurance provider on the individual market. As of next month, more than 90 percent of American counties will have multiple options to choose from.

* **LOWER COSTS:** For years, patients have been shocked to receive unexpected bills for thousands of dollars in medical services they never even agreed to. President Trump’s plan bans this deeply unfair practice and ends surprise medical billing. “The days of ripping off American patients are over,” he said.

* **BETTER CARE:** With new ways for Medicare to pay providers, Americans will have access to doctors they trust—whenever they are needed. President Trump is also making sure that politicians don’t get in the way of much-needed research and innovation, ensuring Americans access to the best health care in the world.

**President Trump’s plan** puts American patients first. Unfortunately, under pressure from the far left, Democrats have endorsed healthcare legislation that would result in rationing care, keeping patients on waitlists, and driving the best doctors away from practicing medicine.

**“The Democrat Party** is pushing a socialist nightmare,” President Trump said.

**Americans want real choice,** affordability, and quality in their medical care. They don’t want radical politicians playing games with their health and safety to get votes.

**Under this President** , America’s families and seniors will always be protected.

📖 [**_Read about President Trump’s America First Healthcare Plan!_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5bfc47ef0&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬**[**WATCH: “The Democrat Party is pushing a socialist nightmare.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d869cfbc85&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: VA Senate Race Update
subject: Trump says he's going to win Virginia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have the power to make sure that doesn't happen.
|

| | **Trump is tweeting that he 's going to win in Virginia.** We have the power to make sure that doesn't happen. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da81/53d9897e/559170e7/1c88193b/4081332932/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-wininva?refcode=20200924_f_1_nd__814__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")

---
Derek --

**First,** the GOP claimed that Virginia was a "battleground" state that they could flip back to red in the 2020 election.

**Then,** the Trump campaign opened offices all across the Commonwealth and raised millions of dollars in Virginia.

**NOW,** Donald Trump is tweeting that he's "going to WIN" Virginia and planning campaign rallies in the Commonwealth.

**Bottom line: The Trump campaign and the GOP are determined to win Virginia in November.** We know better than to underestimate them. This team remembers Mark Warner's last election -- he won by less than 1%. We're not taking anything for granted in this election.

**We 're running up against our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before Election Day -- _and these fundraising numbers will be public._** We need to make a strong statement to Mark's GOP opponent that Virginians are backing Mark in this election and want to keep Virginia blue. We're asking for your help to do that.

**Please, if you can, chip in to help us meet this critical fundraising goal and send a strong message to Trump, Mark 's opponent, and the Virginia GOP: We're keeping Virginia blue.**
